params.name: accountId
params.description: The external account number (short) or account ID GUID of the DocuSign account.

params.name: from_date
params.description: Start date for the envelope search. Only envelopes created on or after this date are returned. Format is ISO 8601.

params.name: to_date
params.description: End date for the envelope search. Only envelopes created before this date are returned. Format is ISO 8601.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by envelope status. Valid values include created, sent, delivered, signed, completed, declined, voided, deleted.

params.name: from_to_status
params.description: The status value checked for in the from_date and to_date range. Default is changed.

params.name: count
params.description: Maximum number of envelopes to return. Default is 100.

params.name: start_position
params.description: Starting index position for the result set.

params.name: search_text
params.description: Free text search across envelope metadata including recipient names, email addresses, and custom fields.

params.name: order
params.description: Sort order for results. Valid values are asc and desc.

params.name: order_by
params.description: The envelope property to sort by. Valid values include created, completed, last_modified, sent, status_changed.

params.name: folder_ids
params.description: Comma-separated list of folder IDs to search within.

params.name: include
params.description: Comma-separated list of additional information to include. Valid values include custom_fields, documents, attachments, extensions, folders, recipients, powerform.

items.docs: Returns a list of envelopes that match the specified criteria. Use query parameters to filter by date, status, and other envelope properties.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The external account number (short) or account ID GUID of the DocuSign account.

items.docs: Creates and optionally sends an envelope. An envelope is the container for documents, recipients, and the workflow information. You can create an envelope in draft status to allow for further modifications, or send it immediately upon creation.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The external account number (short) or account ID GUID of the DocuSign account.

params.name: envelopeId
params.description: The envelope ID (GUID) of the envelope.

params.name: include
params.description: Comma-separated list of additional information to include. Valid values include custom_fields, documents, attachments, extensions, folders, recipients, powerform, tabs.

params.name: advanced_update
params.description: When true, allows sender to update an in-process envelope.

items.docs: Retrieves the overall status and properties of a single envelope. Returns information about the envelope including its status, sender, recipients, and documents.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The external account number (short) or account ID GUID of the DocuSign account.

params.name: envelopeId
params.description: The envelope ID (GUID) of the envelope.

params.name: resend_envelope
params.description: When true, resends the envelope to all recipients who have not yet completed their actions.

items.docs: Updates the envelope specified by envelopeId. You can use this method to modify envelope properties such as the email subject and message, resend notifications, void envelopes, and purge documents.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The external account number (short) or account ID GUID of the DocuSign account.

params.name: envelopeId
params.description: The envelope ID (GUID) of the envelope.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of documents associated with the specified envelope. Returns metadata about each document including the document ID, name, type, and order.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The external account number (short) or account ID GUID of the DocuSign account.

params.name: envelopeId
params.description: The envelope ID (GUID) of the envelope.

params.name: documentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the document within the envelope. Use "combined" to retrieve all documents as a single PDF.

items.docs: Retrieves the specified document from the envelope. Returns the document content as a PDF or other supported format.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The external account number (short) or account ID GUID of the DocuSign account.

params.name: envelopeId
params.description: The envelope ID (GUID) of the envelope.

params.name: include_tabs
params.description: When true, includes the tabs associated with each recipient.

params.name: include_extended
params.description: When true, includes extended recipient information.

items.docs: Retrieves the status and information for all recipients of the specified envelope. Returns details about each recipient including their signing status, delivery method, and authentication.

info.name: Docusign Add Recipients to an Envelope

params.name: accountId
params.description: The external account number (short) or account ID GUID of the DocuSign account.

params.name: envelopeId
params.description: The envelope ID (GUID) of the envelope.

params.name: resend_envelope
params.description: When true, resends the envelope after adding recipients.

items.docs: Adds one or more recipients to an envelope. The envelope must be in draft or sent status. For sent envelopes, this creates a corrected version of the envelope.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The external account number (short) or account ID GUID of the DocuSign account.

params.name: envelopeId
params.description: The envelope ID (GUID) of the envelope.

params.name: resend_envelope
params.description: When true, resends the envelope to updated recipients.

items.docs: Updates one or more recipients in a draft or sent envelope. You can modify recipient properties such as name, email, routing order, and authentication settings.

info.name: Docusign Delete Recipients From an Envelope

params.name: accountId
params.description: The external account number (short) or account ID GUID of the DocuSign account.

params.name: envelopeId
params.description: The envelope ID (GUID) of the envelope.

items.docs: Deletes one or more recipients from a draft or sent envelope.

info.name: Docusign List Tabs for a Recipient

params.name: accountId
params.description: The external account number (short) or account ID GUID of the DocuSign account.

params.name: envelopeId
params.description: The envelope ID (GUID) of the envelope.

params.name: recipientId
params.description: A unique identifier for a recipient. This value is assigned by DocuSign and is unique per envelope.

params.name: include_metadata
params.description: When true, includes metadata properties in the response.

items.docs: Retrieves the tabs associated with a specific recipient in an envelope. Returns all tab types assigned to the recipient.

info.name: Docusign Update Tabs for a Recipient

params.name: accountId
params.description: The external account number (short) or account ID GUID of the DocuSign account.

params.name: envelopeId
params.description: The envelope ID (GUID) of the envelope.

params.name: recipientId
params.description: A unique identifier for a recipient. This value is assigned by DocuSign and is unique per envelope.

items.docs: Updates one or more tabs for a recipient in a draft envelope.

info.name: Docusign Create an Embedded Recipient Signing View

params.name: accountId
params.description: The external account number (short) or account ID GUID of the DocuSign account.

params.name: envelopeId
params.description: The envelope ID (GUID) of the envelope.

items.docs: Generates a URL that enables an embedded recipient to sign an envelope within your application. The URL is time-limited and intended for immediate use.

info.name: Docusign Create an Embedded Sender View

params.name: accountId
params.description: The external account number (short) or account ID GUID of the DocuSign account.

params.name: envelopeId
params.description: The envelope ID (GUID) of the envelope.

items.docs: Generates a URL that enables an embedded sender to edit an envelope in draft status before sending it.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The external account number (short) or account ID GUID of the DocuSign account.

params.name: count
params.description: Maximum number of templates to return. Default is 100.

params.name: start_position
params.description: Starting index for the result set.

params.name: search_text
params.description: Search text to filter templates by name.

params.name: folder
params.description: Folder from which to retrieve templates. Valid values include all, drafts, inbox, sent_items, recyclebin.

params.name: folder_ids
params.description: Comma-separated list of folder IDs to search within.

params.name: shared_by_me
params.description: When true, returns templates shared by the current user.

params.name: order
params.description: Sort order for results. Valid values are asc and desc.

params.name: order_by
params.description: Template property to sort by. Valid values include name, modified, used.

params.name: used_from_date
params.description: Filter templates used on or after this date.

params.name: used_to_date
params.description: Filter templates used before this date.

params.name: include
params.description: Comma-separated list of additional information to include. Valid values include custom_fields, documents, folders, notifications, recipients.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of templates associated with the specified account. Templates define reusable envelopes with predefined documents, recipients, tabs, and routing.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The external account number (short) or account ID GUID of the DocuSign account.

items.docs: Creates a new template from scratch or from an existing template. Templates define the document content, recipients, tabs, and routing for reusable envelope workflows.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The external account number (short) or account ID GUID of the DocuSign account.

params.name: templateId
params.description: The ID of the template.

params.name: include
params.description: Comma-separated list of additional properties to include.

items.docs: Retrieves the definition and properties of the specified template, including its documents, recipients, tabs, and routing information.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The external account number (short) or account ID GUID of the DocuSign account.

params.name: templateId
params.description: The ID of the template.

items.docs: Updates the template specified by templateId. You can modify the template name, description, documents, recipients, and tabs.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The external account number (short) or account ID GUID of the DocuSign account.

params.name: templateId
params.description: The ID of the template.

items.docs: Deletes the specified template. Deleted templates are moved to the recycle bin and can be recovered within a retention period.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The external account number (short) or account ID GUID of the DocuSign account.

params.name: templateId
params.description: The ID of the template.

params.name: include_tabs
params.description: When true, includes the tabs associated with each recipient.

items.docs: Retrieves the recipients defined in the specified template, including their roles, routing order, and tab assignments.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The external account number (short) or account ID GUID of the DocuSign account.

params.name: templateId
params.description: The ID of the template.

items.docs: Updates one or more recipients in the specified template.
